{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Union strike team
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== The Captain ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Union strike team]] included at least one [[Archmage]] and another mage of comparable level.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c13">''The Captain'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Professor Vallenar]] destroyed a [[Union strike team]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c22">''The Captain'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
